_meta.author: ravikatiyar162
_meta.title: Orbiting Avatars
_meta.description:
Orbiting Avatars CTA
Description: A visually engaging Call-to-Action (CTA) component that displays a central message, a button, and a configurable set of avatars that gently float and orbit around the content. It's designed to highlight community, contributors, or users in a dynamic way.
